title: cyphomeris gypsophiloides
intro: Cyphomeris gypsophiloides, also known as the rock jasmine or desert rock jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Cyphomeris gypsophiloides include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are typically used to harness its medicinal properties.
